models.name: personorganization_sumtotal
models.description: This table aggregates information about individuals and their associated organizations, including their primary status, joining dates, and synchronization details. Use this table when you need to: 1. Track organizational membership and reporting relationships, 2. Generate department-specific learning reports, 3. Manage organizational changes and transfers, 4. Implement organization-based access controls, 5. Create organizational learning dashboards, 6. Track learning compliance by organizational unit, 7. Manage cross-organizational learning initiatives, 8. Handle organizational restructuring and user reassignments.

properties.description: Foreign key referencing the person entity in the database.
Foreign key referencing the organization table to get organization details.
Indicates whether the organization is the primary one associated with the person.
The date when a person joined the organization.
Identifier for the user or system that created the record.
Column representing the main organization associated with a person.
Indicates whether there is a synchronization fault for the associated person and organization.
A text field that stores a list of synchronization fault counts related to person-organization records.
Identifier for the batch process related to the person organization records.
Indicates whether the record has been marked as deleted.
Timestamp indicating when the record was created in the system.
Timestamp indicating when the record was last modified.
Column indicating the user who last modified the record.
This table aggregates information about individuals and their associated organizations, including their primary status, joining dates, and synchronization details.
